description: You are leading an amateur radio DXpedition to Sable Island. Configure GPredict for this deployment by creating two ground stations: 'Sable_Island' (43.9333 N, 59.9167 W, 5m) and 'Halifax' (44.6488 N, 63.5752 W, 10m). Set up a tracking module named 'DXpedition' using the 'Sable_Island' ground station and tracking these satellites: ISS (ZARYA) (25544), AO-7 (7530), SO-50 (27607), AO-73 / FUNCUBE-1 (39444), and AO-85 / FOX-1A (40967). Configure the 'DXpedition' module to show only the tabular 'List' view, removing the Map and Polar views. Delete the default 'Amateur' module to declutter the workspace. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
